texto: Montanans believe in the right to make a good life for their families. How they define a family should be their business and their business alone. I'm proud to support marriage equality because no one should be able to tell a Montanan or any American who they can love and who they can marry.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jon Tester sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “Montanans believe in the right to make a good life for their families. How they define a family s…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, love, vida, útil em momentos de casamento e vida.

frase_original: Montanans believe in the right to make a good life for their families. How they define a family should be their business and their business alone. I'm proud to support marriage equality because no one should be able to tell a Montanan or any American who they can love and who they can marry.
